title: Solver Constraints Configuration
description: Toggle settings for hard and soft constraints. All toggles default to reasonable production values.

prayer_enabled.description: Whether Period 0 is reserved for assembly/prayer. When true, Period 0 exists but is NOT counted toward teacher daily load.

language_sync_enabled.description: Whether language block synchronization is enforced. When true, ALL language teachers for a section must be free during language periods. Set to false if section does not have multiple language streams.

class_teacher_period_1.description: Whether class teacher must have Period 1 with their section daily. Ensures class teacher can take attendance, make announcements.

no_subject_twice_daily.description: Prevent same subject twice in a day (except lab blocks). Set to true for variety; false allows Math in P2 and P7.

core_morning_only.description: Prefer core subjects (Math, Science, English) in morning periods P1-P3.

substitution_reserve_count.description: Minimum free teachers per period for emergency substitution coverage.

max_consecutive_default.description: Default maximum consecutive teaching periods for teachers without explicit setting.

max_daily_load_variance.description: Maximum allowed difference between a teacher's busiest and lightest day. Prevents 7 periods Monday, 2 periods Tuesday scenarios.

soft_weights.description: Weights for soft constraint penalties in objective function. Higher weight = stronger preference. Set to 0 to disable a constraint.

teacher_balance.description: Weight for teacher daily load balance across the week.

minimize_gaps.description: Weight for minimizing idle gaps in teacher schedules.

core_morning.description: Weight for scheduling core subjects in morning periods.

leisure_afternoon.description: Weight for scheduling leisure subjects (PE, Art, Music) in afternoon.

avoid_pe_period_1.description: Weight for avoiding PE in Period 1 (students not warmed up).

avoid_pe_after_lunch.description: Weight for avoiding PE immediately after lunch.

subject_distribution.description: Weight for distributing heavy subjects across the week (avoid clustering).

teacher_free_period.description: Weight for ensuring teachers get at least one free period daily for preparation.

fair_slot_distribution.description: Weight for fair distribution of undesirable slots (last periods, Friday/Saturday).

specialist_priority.description: Weight for prioritizing specialist teachers (rare subjects like Sanskrit, Music, Art). Higher weight ensures their limited hours are scheduled.
